# `getKey`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, C128, VIC20  
**Parameters:** `—`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>[byte] = GetKey( );</h3>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>
On C64 and Vic 20 - reads the keyboard and return the highest key pressed.
</p>


<h3>Vic 20 Example</h3>
<code>
    if (getkey() = KEY_NONE) then // no key is pressed

    if (getkey() = KEY_SPACE) then // spacebar is pressed
</code>


</div>
